Housing and the shape of the state
Gramsci and Kropotkin, on why rent has always been political.

A kd-dialogues audio round from The Kiwi Dialectic.
Cast: Gramsci, Kropotkin.

Chapters:
00:00 — cold open
00:23 — I. Diagnosis · act intro i  diagnosis
00:29 — I. Diagnosis · gramsci 01
01:02 — I. Diagnosis · kropotkin 02

02:34 — III. Proposal · gramsci 01
02:54 — III. Proposal · kropotkin 02
03:19 — end card
